title: Machine Gun Kelly: Mainstream Sellout Live from Cleveland - The Pink Era
original_title: Mainstream Sellout Live From Cleveland: The Pink Era
overview: This concert film takes fans on a journey with Machine Gun Kelly during his unforgettable 2022 homecoming performance at Cleveland’s FirstEnergy Stadium along with exclusive behind-the-scenes moments from his sold-out world tour.
